grades.expectation: Response specifies 12 months bank statements for savings showing accumulation pattern
grades.reason: Explicitly states '12 months of the client's bank/building society statements showing the gradual accumulation of the £200,000'

grades.expectation: Response requires giftor's ID and giftor's bank statements (not just the buyer's)
grades.reason: Clearly requires 'Photographic ID (passport or driving licence) for the parents' and '3-6 months of bank statements for the parents'

grades.expectation: Response requires a signed gift letter confirming no obligation to repay
grades.reason: Specifies 'Signed gift letter from the parents confirming... That there is no obligation for the client to repay the gift'

grades.expectation: Response mentions risk-based approach (not tick-box compliance)
grades.reason: States 'Apply a risk-based approach, with the depth of enquiry proportionate to the risk profile'

grades.expectation: Response mentions record-keeping period of 5 years from end of transaction
grades.reason: States 'Retain all AML records for 5 years from the end of the business relationship'
